title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (noise and Nuisance) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (noise and Nuisance) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the North East District Council (Noise and Nuisance) Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In these Bye-laws, unless the context otherwise requires
"District Council" means the North East District Council.

provisions.title: Prohibition of noises and nuisances
